title: SpeechToSpell
body:
The SpeechToSpell fabric-mod adds multiple spells from the Harry-Potter-universe to Minecraft. Using speech-recognition the spells can be cast by saying them out loud while using a wand or by using the spell-hotbar.

Getting started:

Craft the Wand Maker

The Wand Maker can be crafted using one amethyst crystal, five wooden planks of any type and three warped stems arranged in the following manner:



Craft the Crimson Wand

The Crimson Wand can be crafted in the Wand Maker putting one crimson plank in the wood slot and one string in the core slot:



Cast a Spell

To cast a spell say it out loud while holding right click with the wand:



The spell-hotbar

Press N to open the GUI to configure wand's spell-hotbar: Here are all implemented spells listed.
Press R to cycle through the spell-hotbar and G to cast a spell.



Wand Display

The Wand Maker can be used as a display for wands:



A Guide To Magic

In the "A Guide To Magic"-Book which can be crafted using one amethyst shard and one book, all spells and their function are listed
